testcase.name: test_register_fresh_email_no_immediate_link_sent
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration42_delayed_schedule_otp_lock.py:119: in test_register_fresh_email_no_immediate_link_sent assert r.status_code == 200, f"register failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: register failed: 409 {"detail":"You have already attended an interview with us. Please try again after 4 months from your last interview."} E assert 409 == 200 E + where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_register_succeeds_after_120_days
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration42_delayed_schedule_otp_lock.py:189: in test_register_succeeds_after_120_days assert r.status_code == 200, f"expected 200 (block lifted), got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: expected 200 (block lifted), got 409: {"detail":"You have already attended an interview with us. Please try again after 4 months from your last interview."} E assert 409 == 200 E + where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code
